name: Claros Textile Dictionary
description: Internal textile passport dictionary for modular Digital Product Passport implementations.

authority.derivationNotice: This dictionary is curated by Claros DPP for implementation use and should be replaced or versioned when an official textile semantic model is adopted.

versioning.compatibilityPolicy: IRIs under /dictionary/textile/v1 remain stable for non-breaking revisions. Breaking semantic changes require a new version path and semantic model key.

interoperabilityProfile.termModel: Each dictionary term is represented as a dereferenceable RDF property and SKOS concept with explicit data type, category, and application field mapping metadata.
